title: Local filesystem provider
definition_of_done: FilesystemProvider.Fetch reads file, returns content+SHA+empty versionID; TestFilesystem* passes
outcome: FilesystemProvider.Fetch reads local file; fingerprint computed by caller via Fingerprint(); 6 TestFilesystem* tests pass

notes.msg: Implemented FilesystemProvider in internal/sources/filesystem.go: Type() returns 'filesystem', Fetch() reads file at entry.URL via os.ReadFile. Provider interface returns []byte; SHA-256 fingerprint is computed by caller via Fingerprint(content) — documented in code. VersionID is empty for local files (no remote versioning). Tests in filesystem_test.go cover: correct Type(), content match, fingerprint correctness, empty versionID pattern, missing-file error, and interface satisfaction. All TestFilesystem* tests pass; go build ./... clean.
